# Gabriele Baldassarre — Divulgazione scientifica, automazione e data science
# llms.txt — Guida per AI crawler verso i contenuti canonici del blog
#
# Schema metadati custom:
#   {{ site.url }}/metadata-schema.jsonld
#   Descrive l'ontologia dei propertyID custom usati nei JSON-LD del blog
#   (metriche lessicali deterministiche + [future] metriche cognitive LLM-based)

{% for post in site.posts %}
## [{{ post.title | smartify }}]({{ post.url | absolute_url }})
{% if post.excerpt %}{{ post.excerpt | strip_html | normalize_whitespace | truncate: 200 }}{% endif %}
{% if post.difficulty_label %}  Difficulty: {{ post.difficulty_label | capitalize }}{% endif %}
{% if post.intended_audience %}  Audience: {{ post.intended_audience }}{% endif %}
{% if post.readability %}  Readability: Gulpease {{ post.readability.gulpease | round: 1 }}, Flesch-Vacca {{ post.readability.flesch_vacca | round: 1 }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

## Pagine
{% for page in site.pages %}
{% if page.show_nav %}
- [{{ page.title | smartify }}]({{ page.url | absolute_url }})
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
